name: Pinecone Memory
description: Long-term vector memory for OpenClaw agents using Pinecone

apiKey.label: Pinecone API Key
apiKey.help: Pinecone API key (or use ${PINECONE_API_KEY} env var)

agentId.label: Agent ID
agentId.help: Unique identifier for this agent (used as Pinecone namespace prefix)

compactAfterDays.label: Compact After Days
compactAfterDays.help: Days after which old turns are compacted into Pinecone
